case_title: SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS, INC. VS. FAIRFIELD ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRFIELD ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEEDWAY COPY SYSTEMS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAIRFIELD ASSOCIATES $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.30 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,903.30, FULL SECURITY, PLUS STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $200.00 AS PER CC 1950.7, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE MOVE OUT DATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
